name: mabl AI Test Automation API
what_it_does: mabl API for AI-native test automation platform. Enables programmatic management of test runs, test plans, environments, and results. mabl uses AI to auto-heal tests and detect visual regressions. AI agents can trigger test execution, retrieve results, and integrate test intelligence into CI/CD pipelines.
use_cases: Triggering automated test runs from CI/CD pipeline agents
Retrieving test execution results and failure analysis from QA workflow agents
Managing test environments and configurations from deployment agents
Analyzing flaky test patterns and AI healing statistics from test intelligence agents
not_for: Unit or API-level testing (mabl is UI/e2e focused)
Teams without web application testing needs
best_when: A QA team using mabl wants AI agents to orchestrate test runs, retrieve pass/fail data, and integrate intelligent test results into development workflows.
avoid_when: You only need simple API testing — mabl is overkill. Consider Postman or Checkly for API-only scenarios.

auth.notes: mabl API key authentication. Keys generated in mabl workspace settings. Workspace-scoped access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: limited test runs and users
pricing.paid_tiers: Team and Enterprise plans with volume pricing
pricing.notes: SaaS test automation pricing. Free plan available for small teams.

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Test execution is async — agents must poll for results or use webhooks
mabl's AI auto-healing changes test structure without notice — results may differ across runs
Workspace and environment IDs required for test triggering
Rate limits not publicly documented — monitor for 429 responses
agent_readiness.security_notes: Test results may capture sensitive application UI. SOC2 certified. API keys must be secured.

security_score_components.security_notes: Test screenshots may capture sensitive UI. SOC2. API key auth.
